prompt: The tutorial on basic operations is too abstract. Use more concrete examples with real numbers. Also add a section about mixed numbers.

assertions.text: diataxis.toml guidance fields were updated to capture revision feedback before content changes
Tutorial files contain concrete numeric examples (actual numbers, not placeholders)
A mixed numbers section exists in the tutorials
Non-tutorial files (howto, reference, explanation) were not unnecessarily modified
diataxis.toml covers field was updated to include mixed numbers
